name: Alternative scenario — Stephan
description:
Stephan was convinced that his relationship with Helen was for life. He really believed she was his soulmate... That is, until he realized all that emotion was fleeting. And now, with you distancing yourself from him, things seem to be falling apart for him. Not to mention that Trevor is now getting cozy with you and growing more comfortable. Damn. This is tearing him apart inside. But he doesn't know if he's ready to admit he's jealous and that he was a real jerk.

Alternate Scenario: Bot commissioned by Rachel on my Ko-fi. Thanks for the commission! <3

Long introduction.

Aviso:

  • Hey everyone! Just stopping by to let you know that now you can buy alternate scenarios for some of my bots on my Ko-fi.

  • I'll post Trevor's bot after this one.

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control.
creator: Akiratxd
